poojas.name: Ganapathi Pooja
poojas.description: Sacred ritual to invoke Lord Ganesha's blessings for removing obstacles and ensuring success in new ventures.

faq.question: When should Ganapathi Pooja be performed?
faq.answer: Ganapathi Pooja can be performed before any new venture, on Wednesdays, or during Ganesh Chaturthi for maximum blessings.

faq.question: What do we need to prepare?
faq.answer: You need to prepare a clean, sacred space for the ceremony. Our pandit will bring all necessary items including puja materials, flowers, and sacred texts.

faq.question: What are the benefits?
faq.answer: Ganapathi Pooja removes obstacles, brings prosperity, ensures success in endeavors, and provides divine protection.

poojas.name: Navagraha Pooja
poojas.description: Fire ritual to appease nine planetary deities for cosmic balance and harmony.

faq.question: What is Navagraha Pooja?
faq.answer: Navagraha Pooja is a Vedic ritual performed to appease the nine planetary deities to reduce their malefic effects and enhance their positive influences on one's life.

faq.question: When should this pooja be performed?
faq.answer: It can be performed on auspicious days throughout the year, especially beneficial during planetary transitions or when experiencing delays and obstacles in life.

poojas.name: Satyanarayana Pooja
poojas.description: Monthly prosperity and peace ritual dedicated to Lord Vishnu.

faq.question: When should Satyanarayana Pooja be performed?
faq.answer: Satyanarayana Pooja can be performed on full moon days, special occasions, or monthly for prosperity and peace.

faq.question: What do we need to prepare?
faq.answer: You need to prepare a clean, sacred space for the ceremony. Our pandit will bring all necessary items including puja materials, flowers, and sacred texts.

poojas.name: Rudra Abhishekam
poojas.description: Sacred abhishek ritual performed on Shiva Linga with holy substances to invoke Lord Shiva's blessings for health, prosperity, and moksha.

faq.question: What is Rudrabhishek?
faq.answer: Rudrabhishek is a sacred ritual where the Shiva Linga is bathed with holy substances like milk, honey, ghee, and water while chanting Vedic mantras from the Rudra Ashtadhyayi.

faq.question: When is the best time to perform Rudrabhishek?
faq.answer: Mondays, Pradosham days, Mahashivaratri, and Shravan month are the most auspicious times.

poojas.name: Lakshmi Kubera Pooja
poojas.description: Powerful ritual invoking both Goddess Lakshmi and Lord Kubera for wealth, abundance, and financial prosperity.

faq.question: Who should perform this pooja?
faq.answer: Anyone seeking financial growth, business prosperity, debt relief, or career advancement can benefit from this pooja.

faq.question: Can this be done for a new business?
faq.answer: Yes, it is highly recommended before launching a new business, taking a loan, or making significant investments.

poojas.name: Naamkaran Sanskar
poojas.description: Sacred naming ceremony for newborns, one of the 16 Shodasha Samskaras, performed to bless the child with a meaningful, auspicious name.

faq.question: When should Naamkaran be performed?
faq.answer: Naamkaran is typically performed on the 11th, 12th, or 14th day after birth. The exact date is determined based on the baby's birth chart and family traditions.

faq.question: What do we need to prepare?
faq.answer: You need to prepare a clean, sacred space for the ceremony. Our pandit will bring all necessary puja materials, flowers, and sacred texts.

faq.question: Can we choose the name?
faq.answer: Yes, you can suggest names and the pandit will help select the most auspicious one based on the child's birth chart and astrological considerations.

poojas.name: Sudarshana Homam
poojas.description: Powerful Vedic fire ritual invoking Lord Vishnu's divine Sudarshana Chakra to destroy negative energies, evil eye, and black magic.

faq.question: When should Sudarshana Homam be performed?
faq.answer: It is recommended when experiencing persistent illness, financial losses, family conflicts, bad dreams, or suspected evil eye and negative energies.

faq.question: How does this homam protect us?
faq.answer: The Sudarshana Chakra is Lord Vishnu's weapon of divine protection. The homam invokes this energy to create a protective shield around the family and home.

poojas.name: Annaprashna Sanskara
poojas.description: The sacred first rice-feeding ceremony for infants, one of the Shodasha Samskaras, marking the transition from milk to solid food with divine blessings.

included: Blessings for child's health and growth

faq.question: At what age is Annaprashana performed?
faq.answer: Traditionally performed in the 6th month for boys and the 5th or 7th month for girls. The exact timing can vary based on family customs and the child's health.

faq.question: What food is offered during the ceremony?
faq.answer: Rice kheer (payasam) mixed with ghee is typically offered as the first solid food. Our pandit will guide you on the preparation and offering procedure.

poojas.name: Mrutunjaya Homam
poojas.description: Powerful Vedic fire ritual chanting the Mahamrityunjaya mantra to invoke Lord Shiva's blessings for protection from illness, accidents, and untimely death.

faq.question: Who should perform Mrityunjaya Homam?
faq.answer: It is recommended for people recovering from serious illness, those with health fears, individuals with Shani or Rahu dosha, or anyone seeking divine protection for their family.

faq.question: What is the significance of the Mahamrityunjaya mantra?
faq.answer: The Mahamrityunjaya mantra is one of the most powerful Vedic mantras addressed to Lord Shiva in his aspect as the conqueror of death. It promotes healing, longevity, and liberation.

poojas.name: Chandi Durga Pooja
poojas.description: Powerful ritual invoking Goddess Chandi (Durga) to destroy negative forces and bring victory, courage, and protection.

faq.question: When to perform Chandi Pooja?
faq.answer: Navratri, full moon, or Tuesdays are auspicious for Chandi Pooja.

faq.question: What are the benefits?
faq.answer: Chandi Pooja provides protection from negative energies, brings courage, removes obstacles, and ensures victory in endeavors.

poojas.name: Ayush Homam
poojas.description: Vedic fire ritual for longevity, health, and vitality. Invokes divine blessings for a long and disease-free life.

faq.question: Best time to perform Ayush Homam?
faq.answer: Birthdays, after recovery from illness, or during Dhanurmasam are ideal.

faq.question: Who should perform this homam?
faq.answer: Anyone seeking longevity, good health, and vitality can perform this homam.

poojas.name: Saraswati Pooja
poojas.description: Sacred ritual to invoke Goddess Saraswati for wisdom, knowledge, education success, and creative arts.

faq.question: When to perform Saraswati Pooja for exams?
faq.answer: Perform before exams, on Vasant Panchami, or Wednesdays for best results.

faq.question: Who should perform this pooja?
faq.answer: Students, teachers, artists, musicians, and anyone seeking knowledge and wisdom.

poojas.name: Diwali Lakshmi Pooja
poojas.description: Auspicious Lakshmi Pooja on Diwali night to welcome Goddess of wealth and prosperity into your home.

faq.question: Best muhurta for Diwali Lakshmi Pooja?
faq.answer: Lakshmi Pooja is performed on Diwali evening during Pradosh Kaal.

faq.question: What should we prepare?
faq.answer: Clean your home, prepare a decorated altar, and have diyas ready. Our pandit will bring all puja materials.

poojas.name: Ganesh Chaturthi Pooja
poojas.description: Installation and worship of Lord Ganesha idol during the 10-day festival. Includes Sthapana, daily puja, and Visarjan.

faq.question: 10-day or 1-day pooja?
faq.answer: We offer both full 10-day puja and single-day installation packages.

faq.question: Do you provide the Ganesh idol?
faq.answer: You can arrange the idol, and we will perform the installation and daily puja rituals.

poojas.name: Navratri Durga Pooja
poojas.description: Nine nights of Devi worship. Daily puja, Garba guidance, and Kanya Pooja. Celebrates the triumph of good over evil.

faq.question: Which Navratri - Chaitra or Sharad?
faq.answer: Both Chaitra (spring) and Sharad (autumn) Navratri are equally auspicious.

faq.question: What is included in the 9-day package?
faq.answer: Daily puja, Kanya Pooja on the 8th or 9th day, and a concluding havan.

poojas.name: Mundan Sanskar
poojas.description: Sacred head-tonsure ceremony (Chudakarana), one of the 16 samskaras. Performed for spiritual purity and ancestral blessings.

faq.question: When to perform Mundan Sanskar?
faq.answer: Typically in 1st, 3rd, or 5th year. Odd years and odd months are preferred.

faq.question: Can this be done at home?
faq.answer: Yes, the ceremony can be performed at home or at a temple as per your preference.

poojas.name: Upanayana Sanskar
poojas.description: Sacred thread ceremony (Janeu). Marks the beginning of Vedic education and spiritual initiation for the child.

faq.question: Age for Upanayana Sanskar?
faq.answer: Typically performed between 7-16 years depending on community and region.

faq.question: What is the significance?
faq.answer: Upanayana marks the spiritual birth and initiation into Vedic studies and brahmacharya.

poojas.name: Vehicle Pooja
poojas.description: Blessing ceremony for new cars, bikes, or any vehicle. Invokes divine protection for safe travels.

faq.question: At home or showroom?
faq.answer: Can be performed at your home, showroom, or any preferred location.

faq.question: What vehicles can be blessed?
faq.answer: Cars, bikes, scooters, trucks, or any vehicle can be blessed through this pooja.

poojas.name: Business Opening Pooja
poojas.description: Auspicious ceremony for new shop, office, or business venture. Ganapathi and Lakshmi worship for prosperity.

faq.question: Best day for business opening?
faq.answer: Wednesdays (Ganesha), Thursdays (Lakshmi), or Muhurta days are ideal.

faq.question: What should we prepare?
faq.answer: Ensure the space is clean and ready. Our pandits will bring all necessary puja materials.

poojas.name: Seemantham / Baby Shower
poojas.description: Traditional baby shower ceremony (5th, 7th, or 9th month of pregnancy). Blessings for mother and child.

faq.question: When to perform Seemantham?
faq.answer: 5th, 7th, or 9th month of pregnancy - odd months are preferred.

faq.question: What is the significance?
faq.answer: Seemantham blesses the mother and unborn child with health, prosperity, and divine protection.

poojas.name: Vidyarambha Sanskar
poojas.description: Sacred initiation into learning. Child's first formal introduction to letters and education (Aksharabhyasam).

faq.question: Age for Vidyarambha Sanskar?
faq.answer: Usually performed when the child is 3-5 years, often on Vijaya Dashami.

faq.question: What happens during the ceremony?
faq.answer: The child is introduced to letters and learning through writing on rice or sand, with Saraswati's blessings.
